claims.text: What is claimed is: 1. A triiodinated isophthalic acid diamide of the formula ##STR8## wherein the amide residues --CO--N.R 1 R 2 and --CO--N.R 3 R 4 are different from each other and R 1 is hydrogen ...
9. A method of conducting a radiological examination of a patient which comprises administering to the patient a radiopaque amount of a compound of claim 1.
